steps.title: Convert units systematically
steps.content:
We convert 12.1 m/s² to miles/min² using two conversion factors:
  • Meters to miles: Multiply by $\frac{1}{1,609}$ (since 1 mile = 1,609 meters)
  • Seconds² to minutes²: Since 1 minute = 60 seconds, we have 1 minute² = (60)² = 3,600 seconds². Multiply by 3,600
$$12.1 \times \frac{1}{1,609} \times 3,600 = 12.1 \times \frac{3,600}{1,609}$$
